title: Import Time Tracking from Excel
excerpt:

posts.author: CarlyS (Carly S)
posts.cookedHtml:
There’s a feature to ‘Export to Excel’ from the Time Tracking Log, which is great!

It would be even better to be able to ‘Import from Excel’ previously exported times, or manually typed times to save on effort when moving times across from another item that was merged, or other migration reasons.
